violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bars. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at lower bar, which was in use at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and lower bar were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and bars were lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding employees to wash their hands must be posted at hand sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Disposable cups will be used until the dishwasher has been serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and dishwashers at the bars. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The floor of the walk in cooler has an accumulation of dried spilled liquid. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
One ceiling in the kitchen is stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
